1: May the LORD answer you in the day of trouble;may the name of the God of Jacob protect you.
2: May He send you help from the sanctuaryand sustain you from Zion.
3: May He remember all your giftsand look favorably on your burnt offerings.Selah
4: May He give you the desires of your heartand make all your plans succeed.
5: May we shout for joy at your victoryand raise a banner in the name of our God.May the LORD grant all your petitions.
6: Now I know that the LORD saves His anointed;He answers him from His holy heavenwith the saving power of His right hand.
7: Some trust in chariots and others in horses,but we trust in the name of the LORD our God.
8: They collapse and fall,but we rise up and stand firm.
9: O LORD, savethe king.Answer us on the day we call.
